item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 040500Z AUTO VRB03KT 9999 BKN006 OVC010 14/13 Q1011 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 040302Z 0403/0424 VRB02KT 9999 BKN040 PROB40 TEMPO 0403/0409 SCT004 BKN008 PROB30 TEMPO 0404/0409 4000 -SHRA TEMPO 0415/0420 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0416/0420 VRB10G25KT 2000 TSRA BKN020CB
